mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, message_id, provider_name, provider_message_id, delivery_status, fail_reason, callback_payload, delivered_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM notification_delivery WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_delivery ( tenant_id, message_id, provider_name, provider_message_id, delivery_status, fail_reason, callback_payload, delivered_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{messageId}, #{providerName}, #{providerMessageId}, #{deliveryStatus}, #{failReason}, #{callbackPayload, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.shared.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{deliveredAt} )
